airport.name: Qingdao Jiaodong International Airport
airport.toCity: Shuttle buses and taxis available, about 1 hour to city center.

transport.metro: Qingdao Metro covers main tourist and business areas.
transport.taxi: Taxis are metered; insist on using the meter.
transport.didi: Use Didi app for rides; pay via Alipay or WeChat.
tips: Metro is efficient; avoid rush hours for comfort.
Have destinations written in Chinese for taxi drivers.
Carry small cash for transport and quick purchases.

payment.alipay: Set up with international card for seamless payments.
payment.wechatPay: Widely accepted; download app and add card.
payment.cash: Carry some for markets and small eateries.
payment.foreignCard: Visa/Mastercard in hotels and malls; less common elsewhere.

recommendedAreas: Shinan District for beaches and city center access.
Laoshan District for nature and quieter stays.
tips: Book in advance during summer and holidays.
Look for hotels with English-speaking staff.

mustTry: Fresh seafood like grilled squid and shrimp.
foodStreets: Taidong Walking Street for diverse street food.
tips: Choose busy spots for fresh and safe food.
Learn key food terms in Chinese to order.

commonScams: Scalpers selling overpriced tickets or souvenirs.

emergency.localTip: Keep hotel address in Chinese for emergency help.

usefulApps: Alipay for payments and local services.
Baidu Maps for navigation and directions.
bestTimeToVisit: April-May or September-October for mild weather and fewer crowds.
touristTips: Learn basic Mandarin phrases for daily use.
Keep valuables safe in crowded areas.
Use sunscreen and drink water in summer.
Explore local neighborhoods for authentic experiences.
